rent.note: furnished 1BR; range $400–$800; hilly city limits apartment supply

utilities.note: electric + water + fiber internet ~$30; mild highland climate

groceries.note: home cooking; local markets cheap, some import goods pricier

diningOut.note: dinner mid-range restaurant $10–15/person; student city keeps prices down

transit.note: city very walkable (compact colonial centro); combis + taxis

coworking.note: limited formal coworking; cafes are popular work spots

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base.

evidence.quote: a nice 1 bedroom apartment can cost anywhere from $400 to $600 USD per month, while a nice 2 bedroom apartment can cost anywhere from $500 to $800 USD per month

evidence.claim: average rent listed at $716/month; fiber internet $25–40
evidence.quote: Monthly rent costs average $716 per month. High-speed fiber internet (Telmex or Totalplay) costing about $25 to $40 USD monthly

evidence.claim: inland cities like Guanajuato: 1BR $600–$900; similar to Oaxaca range
evidence.quote: in inland cities like Oaxaca or Guanajuato, you can find similar places for $600 to $900 USD
the cost of dinner at a moderately priced restaurant is usually around $10 to $15 USD per person. electricity expected at $30 to $100 USD per month
